name: Cheavy
description:
First ever character I've made + made at 4 in the morning so warning!!
C!heavy from the Tf2 comics, an intimidating hulk of a man that you work with, he stubborn and set in his egotistical ways.
Takes place when the classics were the current Mercs, made with the RP being c!Medic in mind so may be a little based around them.
creator: Blue_bells_tf2
